caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Choppy Seas Across Barbados Today
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados (Bridgetown) is experiencing east-southeast swell-driven seas with significant wave heights around 5.2 ft and a 6 s period, maximum winds near 14 kt, and 100% rain probability; nearby St. Lucia (Castries) reports winds around 10 kt. I'm advising vessel operators and cruise planners to expect short-period choppy seas, frequent heavy showers with reduced visibility, and localized gusts in squalls near the ESE swell axis, and to secure small boats and adjust schedules in Bridgetown and Castries until conditions improve.

mediterranean.headline: Small Craft Conditions in Cadiz and Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing west winds around 21 kt with seas to 4.8 ft, a dominant 12 s W swell, and less than 10% rain probability. I expect Small Craft Advisory conditions for exposed waters and advise operators to secure loose gear and avoid open-water transits; Mykonos is the runner-up with gusty winds to 23 kt.
